one_time_items.description: OBBBA (One Big Beautiful Bill Act) tax expense recognized in FY26

evidence_phrases: the agentic AI inflection point has arrived
Enterprise adoption of agents is skyrocketing
Our customers are racing to invest in AI compute
warning_phrases: NVIDIA is not assuming any Data Center compute revenue from China in its outlook
qualitative_signals.guidance_color: Revenue plus or minus 2%; gross margin plus or minus 50 basis points
approximations: GAAP and non-GAAP operating expenses are expected to be approximately $7.7 billion and $7.5 billion, respectively
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: Computing demand is growing exponentially — the agentic AI inflection point has arrived. Grace Blackwell with NVLink is the king of inference today — delivering an order-of-magnitude lower cost per token — and Vera Rubin will extend that leadership even further

source_quotes.results_actual.revenue_usd_b: NVIDIA today reported record revenue for the fourth quarter ended January 25, 2026, of $68.1 billion, up 20% from the previous quarter and up 73% from a year ago.
source_quotes.results_actual.non_gaap_eps: For the quarter, GAAP and non-GAAP earnings per diluted share were $1.76 and $1.62, respectively.
source_quotes.results_actual.gaap_eps: For the quarter, GAAP and non-GAAP earnings per diluted share were $1.76 and $1.62, respectively.
source_quotes.results_actual.gross_margin_pct: For the quarter, GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins were 75.0% and 75.2%, respectively.
source_quotes.results_actual.operating_margin_pct: Computed: operating_income_m 46107 / (revenue_usd_b 68.127 * 1000) = 67.7%. Confidence medium per R10.
source_quotes.results_actual.diluted_share_count_m: Weighted average shares used in diluted net income per share computation 24,432
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_mid_b: Revenue is expected to be $78.0 billion, plus or minus 2%.
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_low_b: Computed: 78.0 * 0.98 = 76.44 from "plus or minus 2%". Confidence medium per R10.
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.revenue_high_b: Computed: 78.0 * 1.02 = 79.56 from "plus or minus 2%". Confidence medium per R10.
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.gross_margin_mid_p: GAAP and non-GAAP gross margins are expected to be 74.9% and 75.0%, respectively, plus or minus 50 basis points, inclusive of a 0.1% impact from stock-based compensation expense.
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.gross_margin_low_p: Computed: 75.0 - 0.5 = 74.5 from "plus or minus 50 basis points".
source_quotes.guidance_next_quarter.gross_margin_high_: Computed: 75.0 + 0.5 = 75.5 from "plus or minus 50 basis points".
source_quotes.segment_breakdown[0].revenue_usd_b: Fourth-quarter revenue was a record $62.3 billion, up 22% from the previous quarter and up 75% from a year ago (Data Center)
source_quotes.segment_breakdown[1].revenue_usd_b: Fourth-quarter Gaming revenue was $3.7 billion, up 47% from a year ago
source_quotes.segment_breakdown[2].revenue_usd_b: Fourth-quarter revenue was $1.3 billion, up 74% from the previous quarter and up 159% from a year ago (Professional Visualization)
source_quotes.segment_breakdown[3].revenue_usd_b: Fourth-quarter Automotive revenue was $604 million, up 2% from the previous quarter and up 6% from a year ago
source_quotes.one_time_items[0].amount_usd_m: Tax expense from OBBBA — 48 (FY26 column, footnote *Tax expense included represents impact from OBBBA (One Big Beautiful Bill Act).)
source_quotes.capital_return.buyback_authorization_b: As of the end of the fourth quarter, the company had $58.5 billion remaining under its share repurchase authorization.
source_quotes.capital_return.dividend_per_share: NVIDIA will pay its next quarterly cash dividend of $0.01 per share on April 1, 2026

ambiguous_items.explanation: CRITICAL R15 FLAG: Beginning Q1 FY27, NVIDIA will include stock-based compensation expense in non-GAAP measures. Q1 FY27 non-GAAP gross margin guidance of 75.0% already reflects the 0.1% SBC impact. Non-GAAP OpEx of $7.5B includes $1.9B of SBC. Direct comparison to historical non-GAAP figures is NOT apples-to-apples. All implied multiple valuations should use historical methodology consistency in zımni P/E denominator.
Computed via R4: midpoint $78.0B with stated ±2% tolerance → low=76.44, high=79.56. Confidence medium per R10.
Computed via R4: midpoint 75.0% with stated ±50bps tolerance → low=74.5%, high=75.5%.
EPS guidance NOT provided. Only revenue, gross margin, and operating expenses guided for Q1 FY27. Implied multiple valuation must compute EPS from these inputs separately.
Computed via R1 (direct arithmetic): non-GAAP operating income 46107 / non-GAAP revenue 68127 = 67.7%. Source values are both directly stated. Confidence medium.

Q4 FY26 GAAP net income $42,960M includes $5,491M gain from non-marketable and publicly-held equity securities (per reconciliation table). This is a non-recurring fair value adjustment, not core operating income. Should be considered when comparing to consensus.

Document states FY27 GAAP/non-GAAP tax rates expected 17.0%-19.0% (excluding discrete items). Not captured in standard fields. Useful input for full-year EPS modeling but not a forward guidance metric per the schema.
Q1 FY27 outlook explicitly excludes China data center compute revenue. This is a conservative posture, not a withdrawal. Suggests upside if China revenue resumes. Already captured in warning_phrases.
